textByHash.5a3e5f1a90d15a0f01c20bdf21c72a37caa002a8: It don't look like you have suitable weapons to me! Get out of here you fake!
textByHash.e83e16a64c97909c9e99dde5f55bd434ddef0c05: Okay, I see ya got some weapons. But here's da thing. These guys out here, they don't wanna be found. They paid me good money to keep em hidden.
textByHash.f54ffcd75d38490e2f5ab6af6dc09705d9e730af: Now, you seems all sincered up to me... It's choking me up right here. But hey, I's godda do my job or da kids don't get fed!
textByHash.57fab24e3b17fa6331d89298839e29c3e83508b0: Okay, I's got an idea. Say I asks you a few questions and you answer them all correct and so on... Well that'd make me trust you's. How's dat sound?
textByHash.c7f25b9db1c7a00911be67ed720ca031b768aad0: Hey... Don't tempt me! You's dicing wiv death here my friend!
textByHash.f59f9c6614d8eb1b88dabba357e674dd1b253b82: Okay, first question. Name the only female member of the Myreque.
textByHash.1fda71c315daf7252894406c0ddecc2f5d52c11a: Okay, second question. Name the only female member of the Myreque.
textByHash.ad1fb13e020dcedb9a8830eb49316da4a8ec6311: Okay, third and final question. Name the only female member of the Myreque.
textByHash.c17a78a16e56aaa670f33d2e24dcb5344bbe85e1: Okay, first question. Who is the youngest member of the Myreque?
textByHash.d8b0e1a3f221383df614ab8931ef493d2062edac: Okay, second question. Who is the youngest member of the Myreque?
textByHash.8181e15e72887b98010844ae6e67228d7d624d2a: Okay, third and final question. Who is the youngest member of the Myreque?
textByHash.ccfd95e7da802eea84fcc227a96835edb5937ef0: Okay, first question. Who is the leader of the Myreque in Mort Myre?
textByHash.12ad600e1f20ad05574829a5368d395ac5b79284: Okay, second question. Who is the leader of the Myreque in Mort Myre?
textByHash.5e8d356118c3354a2e8ae72e005e83908a38a595: Okay, third and final question. Who is the leader of the Myreque in Mort Myre?
textByHash.de31ff1364a2b92d1f2a81155acaceb973142d69: Okay, first question. Which member of the Myreque was originally a scholar?
textByHash.1541eadd74fd99eb8b171475971ac48a58963021: Okay, second question. Which member of the Myreque was originally a scholar?
textByHash.63e5a45bbc787d4cdf81fdbb34a1a0443f9d46ad: Okay, third and final question. Which member of the Myreque was originally a scholar?
textByHash.7de39290934cbc477123c9d0c7339be3cf86fad8: Okay, first question. What is the name of the boatman who helps the Myreque?
textByHash.6af2d6f510e8abe0f680e73e17a327e4a3c4c72b: Okay, second question. What is the name of the boatman who helps the Myreque?
textByHash.991fd07dde8ef9529607bfb6cf138a816d24d98c: Okay, third and final question. What is the name of the boatman who helps the Myreque?
textByHash.437c86b20e5a5c68822259ae066159a41e8c015f: Okay, first question. What vampyre family rules over Morytania?
textByHash.7f73773364ed06092338a7d3839c9688b6a595ed: Okay, second question. What vampyre family rules over Morytania?
textByHash.e160a4f4729c4fb4a954825a5a3077387fa0f040: Okay, third and final question. What vampyre family rules over Morytania?
textByHash.dacc9e38c26b6925b21b26ccbd6faf2fb343da0a: Okay, interesting answer. That's the first question done.
textByHash.ee9ce152d9808c2df5039ae6d9f7cc775852b444: An interesting response. That's the second question answered.
textByHash.fa7a5dc770c0fe4c8db0727ec9aad1240cda7e5d: Hmm. Very interesting. That's the third question answered.
textByHash.06e92efeaed1bac1dfb641294c25e760d31cafb4: I'm sorry but you got no questions correct! Go on get outta here...
textByHash.97249ddcd7962cc280738a34e7a31bd78f2c72e4: I'm sorry but you only got one question correct! Go on get outta here...
textByHash.e23da95eb7db68f7e6cc49d1be46f4bb2d526191: I'm sorry but you only got two questions correct! Go on get outta here...
textByHash.fe1815a124c8afddbba03b56defe38fdf0f563c6: Okay, I believes ya... You can go on in. Head through the doors behind the tree. Once you's in, take the first cave on the right.
textByHash.2ffaa32a1ed977cf37ec8343fdc0d5b7df20602c: You do if you know what's good for you!
textByHash.e3c552019863e10c33ea3d46e875980f893aa9f5: Come on... Speak up! I may be able to help you. However, yous gotta know that your tresspassing and that by rights I should slap your around a bit. You know, just like as a warning.
textByHash.703edf3aedb3ef5943e188a90743a2c37ef787b4: You got yourself here... Now get yourself out... Quickly if I were you.
textByHash.f814e0e450f416d265ed35c345ff823b5d5cbafc: Sure... Be on your way stranger.
textByHash.58fa973c544c3d2246be8c64743212a52cd8cf9c: Back again? You ain't getting in 'till you answer my questions.
textByHash.a53423ff13d897ab71225fc9e9d1a47e81854253: Wat ya still doing out here? Head through the doors behind the tree. Once you's in, take the first cave on the right.
textByHash.1267d8260eb85e5185191ffeab914b16e87e5a67: Hey. Leave me be. I'm guardin' this place.
